infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: WindSiren records your kite session — top speed, distance, jumps — using your location while the app is open.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: WindSiren uses motion sensors to detect jumps and measure airtime during a kite session.
